heading: Cancellation of bonds issued under section 985
label: 985a Cancellation of bonds issued under section 985
text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, any bond issued under , is hereby canceled together with the obligation to pay such bond.section 985 of this title
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Department of Transportation and Related Agencies Appropriations Act, 1983, and not as part of , , which comprises this chapter.act May 13, 1954, ch. 20168 Stat. 903Section consists of a part of .
